testcase.name: tests.test_flask
testcase.error: tests/test_flask.py:1: in <module> from mapkick.flask import Map, AreaMap mapkick/flask/__init__.py:10: in <module> class MapkickApp: mapkick/flask/__init__.py:12: in MapkickApp @cherrypy.tools.staticfile.handler(static_folder=static_folder) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cherrypy/_cptools.py:175: in handle_func handled = self.callable(*args, **self._merged_args(kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cherrypy/_cptools.py:101: in _merged_args tm = cherrypy.serving.request.toolmaps[self.namespace] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'tools'
